function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter / Helios): INV-0006, INV-0007, and INV-0008.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required. Verification: attachments were all previously read and ordered newest-first within selected oldest-three set (2026-02-17, 2026-01-19, 2025-12-18); recipient matches Miles canonical email; subject with colon is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

Completeness check passed for this inbox request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request end-to-end: prepared a reply draft to Miles with the requested oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm client, and then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox email header as canonical transport metadata, resolved identity via canonical cast records, used one outbox write, applied mandatory newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox message explicitly asked for a reply with the oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm client. Claudia Reiter is the consulting client at helios-tax.example, and six Helios invoices linked to Claudia were verified by reading their records. The three oldest by issued_on are INV-0006 (2025-12-18), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0008 (2026-02-17); these were attached in newest-first order as required for outbox attachments. The inbox file was then removed per inbox-processing cleanup guidance.

read finance rulebooks and six Helios invoices
